pages.name: Home
pages.description: Clinic homepage introducing pediatric endocrinology services and providing quick access to key tasks.
primary_functions: Orient visitors to the clinics pediatric endocrinology services, locations, and age ranges served
Provide prominent calls-to-action for scheduling appointments, requesting refills, accessing forms, and viewing classes
Highlight important announcements such as holiday hours, urgent contact information, or new services

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary Schedule an Appointment call-to-action or the Appointments header link
Click Our Doctors teaser section or header link
Click Classes & Events teaser tile or header link

params.query: Search text entered into homepage education search (e.g., a condition name)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit homepage Learn about your childs condition search form
Click Tools & Growth Charts card or header link
Click billing/insurance promo block or header link
Click Request a Refill quick link or header link
Click Forms & Questionnaires quick link or header link
Click Contact us or About our clinic links in the homepage content

access_methods.description: Default landing page when visiting the site; accessible via the Home header link
Users can navigate directly to the root URL (e.g., /index.html) from bookmarks or search engines

pages.name: Appointments
pages.description: Central page for requesting new and follow-up appointments at all clinic locations.
primary_functions: Explain available appointment types (new patient, follow-up, telehealth) and clinic locations with basic hours

Provide a prominent Schedule a New Patient Visit section with a form including reason for visit (e.g., Type 1 Diabetes), location selection (e.g., Main Clinic  Downtown), date picker, and list of available time slots
Collect required patient and parent/guardian information (child name, DOB, parent name, phone, email) and submit an appointment request

incoming_params.description: Optional clinic location (ClinicLocation.id) to preselect in the appointment form, e.g., Main Clinic  Downtown.
Optional appointment type preset (e.g., new_patient, follow_up, telehealth).
Optional reason-for-visit code such as type_1_diabetes to preselect in the Reason for Visit dropdown.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a Back to Home link or logo after reviewing appointment information

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Appointments link in the main header navigation
Users can open /appointments.html directly from bookmarks or shared links; optional URL parameters prefill the form
When reached with locationId, appointmentType, or reasonCode, the page preselects those values in the scheduling form

pages.name: Our Doctors
pages.description: Directory of pediatric endocrinology providers with filters for specialty, language, and experience.
primary_functions: List all pediatric endocrinology doctors with brief cards showing name, credentials, specialties, languages, experience, and primary location
Allow filtering by specialty/conditions treated (including thyroid disorders), languages spoken (including Spanish), years of experience (including 10+ years), and optional location or subspecialty
Support sorting options such as AZ by last name and allow opening an individual doctors profile page

params.doctorId: Doctor.id of the selected provider card

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a doctors name, photo, or View Profile button in the doctors list
Click a Request appointment button on a doctor card to jump to scheduling with that location preselected

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Our Doctors link in the main header navigation
Users can open /providers.html directly from search engines or bookmarks

pages.name: Doctor Profile
pages.description: Detailed profile for a single pediatric endocrinology doctor.
primary_functions: Display full provider information including bio, education, board certifications, conditions treated (e.g., thyroid disorders), languages spoken, and years of experience
Show office location(s), clinic hours, and maps/directions for the providers main office
Provide clearly visible contact information, including a main office phone number that can be tapped or highlighted, and a link back to the doctor list or to the appointments page

incoming_params.description: Doctor.id for the provider whose profile should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to all doctors link from the profile page

params.locationId: primary_location_id from the loaded Doctor profile

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Request an appointment with this doctor button

access_methods.description: Accessed via /provider_detail.html?doctorId={Doctor.id} from the doctors list or shared links
Profiles can be deep-linked from emails or search results using the doctorId parameter

pages.name: Classes & Events
pages.description: Listing and search page for educational classes and events offered by the clinic.
primary_functions: List upcoming classes and events with title, topic, date, time, and location
Provide search and filters to narrow by topic (e.g., Insulin Pump Education Class), date range (e.g., within the next 60 days), and optionally time of day (evening/after 5:00 PM)
Allow users to open a specific class detail/registration page via a Register or title link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a class title or Register button in the class list

access_methods.description: Accessible through the Classes & Events header navigation link
Users can navigate directly to /classes_events.html from bookmarks or shared links

pages.name: Class Registration
pages.description: Dedicated registration page for a specific class or event.
primary_functions: Display key class details including title, description, date, start time, duration, location, and any prerequisites or fees
Provide a registration form to enter child information (name, date of birth, condition such as Type 1 Diabetes) and parent/guardian contact details (name, phone, email)
Allow users to specify number of attendees, agree to any required consent or policies, and submit registration for the selected class

incoming_params.description: ClassEvent.id of the selected class to display and register for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Classes & Events link or after viewing confirmation message

access_methods.description: Accessed via /class_registration.html?classEventId={ClassEvent.id} when a class is selected from the Classes & Events page
Deep-linked from reminder emails or calendar invitations using the classEventId parameter

pages.name: Patient Education Library
pages.description: Searchable library of pediatric endocrine patient education articles and resources.
primary_functions: Allow keyword search (e.g., growth hormone deficiency) across all patient education articles
Provide filters for topic/category, publication date (including a Past 2 years or custom range), and reading level/audience (including basic or easy-reading options)
Display a list of search results with titles, brief summaries, publication dates, reading level labels, and links to open article detail pages

incoming_params.description: Optional search query text (e.g., a condition name) to initialize the results list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title or Read more link in the results list
Click contextual Find a specialist link shown for some topics (e.g., thyroid or growth concerns)

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Patient Education header navigation link
Users can go directly to /education_library.html, optionally including a query parameter for pre-filled search
When opened with a query parameter, the initial search results are based on that query

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content page for a single patient education article.
primary_functions: Show complete article content including title, topic, publication date, reading level, and any related resources
Provide a clearly labeled control such as Save, Bookmark, or Add to My Resources to save the article to the users saved resources list (e.g., via local storage)
Offer navigation back to the previous search results or the main education library and optionally show links to related articles

incoming_params.description: EducationArticle.id of the article to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to results or Back to Education Library

access_methods.description: Accessed via /article_detail.html?articleId={EducationArticle.id} from the Education Library or shared links
Articles can be deep-linked from emails or search engines using the articleId parameter

pages.name: Tools & Calculators
pages.description: Hub page listing interactive pediatric endocrine tools and calculators.
primary_functions: List available tools such as growth percentile calculator, BMI calculator, and growth chart viewers with brief descriptions
Allow users to open specific tools like the Height Percentile/Growth Calculator via clear buttons or links
Provide basic guidance on how to use the tools and interpret results, including safety/medical disclaimers

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the Growth Calculator or Height Percentile Calculator tool card

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Tools & Growth Charts header navigation link
Users can open /tools.html directly to see the list of available tools

pages.name: Growth Calculator
pages.description: Interactive pediatric growth calculator for height percentile and growth chart visualization.
primary_functions: Allow users to select the childs sex, enter age (with units such as years or months), height with units (cm/inches), and an optional or required weight field with units (kg/lbs)
Calculate the childs height percentile and display results along with a visual growth chart or summary table
Provide a prominent link or button to open a print-friendly version of the growth chart and results

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the Print-Friendly Version or Print Chart button after viewing results

access_methods.description: Accessed from the Tools & Calculators page via a dedicated link or directly via /growth_calculator.html

pages.name: Print-Friendly Growth Chart
pages.description: Simplified, printer-optimized version of the growth calculator results and growth chart.
primary_functions: Display the childs key input data (sex, age, height, optional weight) and resulting height percentile in a clean layout suitable for printing
Show a streamlined growth chart or percentile table without navigation or unnecessary elements for better print quality
Encourage users to use the browsers print function (e.g., instructions like Use your browsers Print option to print this page)

incoming_params.description: GrowthCalculation.id for the previously computed growth percentile to render in print-friendly form.

access_methods.description: Opened as /print_growth_chart.html?calculationId={GrowthCalculation.id} from the Growth Calculator results

pages.name: Billing & Insurance
pages.description: Overview page for billing practices and accepted insurance plans.
primary_functions: Provide general information on billing procedures, payment options, and financial assistance where applicable
Allow users to search or browse accepted insurance plans and filter or search by plan name (e.g., BluePlus Silver HMO)
Link to detailed plan information pages and provide an obvious pathway to contact the billing department using a Contact Billing or Ask a Billing Question link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific insurance plan name in the search results/list

params.insurancePlanId: InsurancePlan.id of the plan currently highlighted or selected (optional)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Contact Billing / Ask a Billing Question link from this page, optionally after selecting a plan

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Billing & Insurance header link
Users can browse directly to /billing_insurance.html from bookmarks or search

pages.name: Insurance Plan Detail
pages.description: Detailed information for a specific insurance plan accepted by the clinic.
primary_functions: Confirm whether the selected insurance plan is accepted at the clinic and show any relevant notes or limitations
Display coverage information specific to specialist or pediatric endocrinology visits, including co-pay amounts and referral requirements where provided
Offer navigation back to the main Billing & Insurance page and a link to the Contact Billing page for further questions

incoming_params.description: InsurancePlan.id for the plan whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Billing & Insurance link

params.insurancePlanId: The same insurancePlanId currently being viewed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Ask a billing question about this plan button

access_methods.description: Accessed via /insurance_plan_detail.html?insurancePlanId={InsurancePlan.id} from the Billing & Insurance plan list
Plan detail pages may be deep-linked from insurer resources or emails

pages.name: Contact Billing
pages.description: Online form for sending questions to the billing and insurance team.
primary_functions: Provide a structured contact form with fields such as subject, free-text message, and optional plan name or account number
Collect the users contact information (name, phone number, email address) required for a response
Submit billing and insurance questions, showing a confirmation message and basic expectations for response time

incoming_params.description: Optional InsurancePlan.id to associate the question with a specific plan and show its name in the form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Billing & Insurance link after sending a question or reviewing contact options

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Contact Billing footer link
When opened with insurancePlanId, the form context and confirmation reference that specific plan
Can be opened directly from emails or patient portal messages requesting billing contact

pages.name: Prescription Refills
pages.description: Form for patients to request prescription refills sent to a preferred pharmacy.
primary_functions: Allow users to indicate patient type (e.g., existing patient) and enter medication details including name (e.g., Levothyroxine 50 mcg tablet) and requested quantity
Provide a pharmacy search tool where users can enter a ZIP code (e.g., 10027), view a list of nearby pharmacies with distances, and select a pharmacy within a chosen range (e.g., within 5 miles)
Enable selection of a desired pickup time slot (e.g., earliest time at or after 4:00 PM today) and collect patient and parent/guardian contact information before submitting the refill request

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Prescription Refills header navigation link
Parents can navigate directly to /prescription_refills.html from bookmarks or instructions provided by the clinic

pages.name: Patient Forms
pages.description: Central location for all patient forms and questionnaires.
primary_functions: List available forms and questionnaires organized by type (e.g., new patient endocrine intake, follow-up visit forms, school medication forms)
Indicate which forms can be completed online and which are downloadable PDFs, with links to each
Provide a clear link or button to open the online New Patient Endocrine Intake / Questionnaire form

params.patientFormId: PatientForm.id of the New Patient Endocrine Intake online form

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Complete online for the New Patient Endocrine Intake / Questionnaire form

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Forms & Questionnaires header navigation link
Users can open /patient_forms.html directly from email reminders or search results

pages.name: New Patient Questionnaire
pages.description: Online pre-visit questionnaire for new pediatric endocrine patients.
primary_functions: Collect child information including name, date of birth, sex, and primary reason for visit (e.g., Early puberty) using text fields and dropdowns
Capture parent/guardian details (name, phone, email), referring provider information, and upcoming visit date via fields and a date picker
Present mandatory medical background questions (e.g., prior endocrine visits, allergies) with simple options and allow users to submit the completed form to the clinic

incoming_params.description: PatientForm.id for the New Patient Endocrine Intake online form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Back to Forms & Questionnaires after submitting or reviewing the questionnaire

access_methods.description: Opened as /new_patient_questionnaire.html?patientFormId={PatientForm.id} from the Patient Forms list
Deep-linked in appointment reminder communications with the patientFormId parameter

pages.name: About & Contact
pages.description: Information about the clinic, providers, and how to contact or visit.
primary_functions: Describe the clinics mission, pediatric endocrinology focus, and types of conditions treated
Provide clinic addresses, main phone and fax numbers, email or contact instructions, and general office hours
Offer basic directions or transportation notes and link to other key sections such as Appointments and Our Doctors

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click Request an Appointment button from About & Contact
Click Meet our doctors link in the About content

access_methods.description: Accessible via the About & Contact footer link
Users can navigate directly to /about_contact.html from search engines or referrals

header_links.description: View and register for education classes and events
Access growth calculators and other tools
Review billing information and accepted insurance plans
Request prescription refills to your pharmacy
Access new patient and other clinic forms

footer_links.description: Learn about the clinic and how to contact us
Profiles and specialties of clinic providers
Schedule of educational classes and events
Billing policies and insurance plan search
Send a question to the billing department
